python - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path

e = Path('results/proofs/evidence_2026-03-04-independent-rerun4')
required_evidence = [
    'kpi_summary.json',
    'payout_attribution_summary.json',
    'staker_revenue_canonical_summary.json',
    'source_of_funds_summary.json',
    'emissions_vs_revenue_decomposition.json',
    'discrepancy_tickets.json',
]
missing_evidence = [f for f in required_evidence if not (e / f).exists()]

required_v2_tables = [
    'results/tables/v2_workflow_summary.json',
    'results/tables/v2_gate_passed_kpis.json',
    'results/tables/v2_gate_validated_scenarios.json',
    'results/tables/v2_bounded_decision_bands.json',
]
missing_v2_tables = [p for p in required_v2_tables if not Path(p).exists()]

required_v2_charts = [
    'results/charts/v2_gate_passed_revenue_components.png',
    'results/charts/v2_gate_passed_claim_efficiency.png',
    'results/charts/v2_bounded_decision_bands.png',
]
missing_v2_charts = [p for p in required_v2_charts if not Path(p).exists()]

summary_path = Path('results/tables/v2_workflow_summary.json')
summary = json.loads(summary_path.read_text()) if summary_path.exists() else {}

print('missing_evidence:', missing_evidence)
print('missing_v2_tables:', missing_v2_tables)
print('missing_v2_charts:', missing_v2_charts)
print('v2_summary_keys:', sorted(summary.keys()))
for key in ['strict_gate_passed','strict_gate_status','status','validated_scenarios_count','generated_at_utc','evidence_dir']:
    if key in summary:
        print(f'{key}:', summary[key])
PY

print('charts_dir:', s.get('charts_dir'))
print('evidence_dir:', s.get('evidence_dir'))
print('gate_kpis_status:', s.get('gate_kpis_status'))
print('scenario_status:', s.get('scenario_status'))
print('bounded_band_status:', s.get('bounded_band_status'))
